projectDescription: An open source web app for securely sharing passwords, text, files, and URLs via self-deleting one-time links with full audit logs.
keyFeatures: One-time secret links that self-delete after a set number of views or days
Support for text/password pushes, file uploads, URL redirects, and QR codes
Full audit log tracking views, IP addresses, user agents, and timestamps
Passphrase protection for additional security on shared secrets
JSON REST API for programmatic access and automation
Docker, Kubernetes, and Helm deployment support
White-label customization with 26 Bootswatch themes and custom branding
Encrypted at-rest storage with automatic deletion of expired content
publicApiSurface: GET /p/:url_token.json — Retrieve a push (counts as a view)
GET /p/:url_token/preview.json — Get the secret URL without counting a view
GET /p/:url_token/audit.json — Retrieve the audit log for a push
GET /p/active.json — List active pushes for authenticated user
GET /p/expired.json — List expired pushes for authenticated user
POST /r.json — Create a URL redirect push
